courses.title: C Programming
courses.description: Master the fundamentals of C, the foundation of modern languages. Learn memory management, pointers, and key algorithmic elements.
courses.syllabus:
Introduction to C
Variables & Data Types
Operators & Expressions
Control Flow (If-Else, Loops)
Arrays & Strings
Functions & Recursion
Pointers & Memory Allocation
Structures & Unions
File Handling in C
courses.learningOutcomes:
Write efficient standalone computer programs from scratch
Understand complete computer memory alignment, stack and heap allocation
Develop solid program debugging skills with GDB
courses.prerequisites: No prior computer science or coding background required.

courses.title: C++
courses.description: Dive deep into Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) with robust memory administration, template systems, and the STL library.
courses.syllabus:
C++ Basics & Syntax
OOP Principles: Classes & Objects
Inheritance & Polymorphism
Encapsulation & Abstraction
Pointers & References
Memory Allocation & Deconstructors
Templates & Operator Overloading
Standard Template Library (STL)
Exception Handling
courses.learningOutcomes:
Build modular, highly components-oriented software designs
Leverage C++ Standard Template Library for advanced collections
Manage object-oriented architectures and multi-class design patterns
courses.prerequisites: Basic knowledge of C Programming is beneficial but not mandatory.

courses.title: Java
courses.description: Build robust, cross-platform enterprise software. Master core Java, multithreading, OOP, and foundational collections.
courses.syllabus:
Core Java Fundamentals
Object-Oriented Programming in Java
Exception Handling & Assertions
Java Collections Framework (List, Set, Map)
Multithreading & Concurrency
Java I/O & Serialization
Database Connection using JDBC
Lambda Expressions & Streams API
courses.learningOutcomes:
Develop platform-independent consumer and enterprise software
Understand real-world application threading and concurrency mechanisms
Build powerful datastore integrations via JDBC pipeline

courses.title: Python
courses.description: Learn the most versatile programming language. Go from foundational syntax to object-oriented concepts and automated tooling.
courses.syllabus:
Python Introduction & Syntax
Data Structures (Lists, Tuples, Sets, Dicts)
Functions & Modules
File I/O Operations
Object-Oriented Python
Error & Exception Handling
Regular Expressions
Standard Libraries overview
Introduction to Data Processing
courses.learningOutcomes:
Write legible, standard Python code for automation, scripting, and web
Work comfortably with dynamic structural data pipelines
Execute complex file manipulations, scraping, and automation scripts
courses.prerequisites: No specific math or coding prerequisite.

courses.title: Full Stack Development
courses.description: The ultimate path. Build major front-to-back programs. Master database integration, user validation, and responsive frontends.
courses.syllabus:
Software Architecture & System Design overview
React Frontend + Express Node.js Backend pipeline
Database Design: Relational vs Non-Relational models
API Endpoints creation and integration controllers
JWT Session validation & Roles security
Deployment strategies and DevOps pipelines
Working on major Capstone business projects
courses.learningOutcomes:
Deploy live full-stack, authenticated consumer database applications
Architect robust security features guarding user sessions
Configure continuous Integration and production servers autonomously
courses.prerequisites: Proficiency in basic JavaScript or HTML/CSS/Node frameworks.

courses.title: Interview Preparation
courses.description: Refine computer science reasoning, solve live coding puzzles, and review standard scenario evaluations for key enterprise interviews.
courses.syllabus:
Resume Building & GitHub Portfolios crafting
Live algorithmic sessions and whiteboard challenges
System Design fundamentals & Scalability concepts
Common System Behavioral evaluations & HR expectations
Simulated mock interviews under strict time limits
Answering tricky technical concepts (OOP, DBMS, OS, Networking)
courses.learningOutcomes:
Formulate fast responses to advanced coding problems under pressure
Craft professional engineering portfolios highlighting capabilities
Communicate software design choices and performance trade-offs effectively
courses.prerequisites: Familiar with at least one software language and basic DSA.

courses.title: Aptitude Training
courses.description: Develop rapid numerical solvers, logical trackers, and analytical processors crucial for premier competitive exams and campus selections.
courses.syllabus:
Quantitative Ability: Percentages, Profit/Loss, Interest, Averages
Time, Speed, Distance and Ratio proportions
Logical Reasoning: Blood Relations, Coding-Decoding, Seating Arrangements
Data Interpretation: Tables, Bar Charts, Pie Charts, Line Graphs
Verbal Ability: Grammar concepts, Reading Comprehension, Sentence Corrections
Exam-taking methodologies and mental calculation shortcuts
courses.learningOutcomes:
Solve quantitative reasoning equations with high speed and accuracy
Ace standard screening rounds for MNC recruitment processes
Identify logical pathways and data relationships efficiently

inquiries.name: Suresh Kumar
inquiries.message: Hello, I want to join the Python and DSA masterclasses. Can you share the fee layout and morning slot availability details?
